name: Candy Apple Delight
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine whipped topping and pineapple in a Classic 2-Quart Batter Bowl.
2. Peel, core and slice apples with an Apple Peeler/Corer/Slicer. Quarter the slices.
3. Cut candy bar into small cubes using a Garnish.
4. Fold apples and candy into whipped topping mixture.
5. Spread mixture into chilled Chillzanne base.
NOTES: May also add 1/2 cup chopped peanuts.
